description: three exhaustive tests that together only cover one real scenario — looks exhaustive but isn't
input:
class SubscriptionTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
  test "cancel sets state to cancelled" do
    sub = subscriptions(:active)
    sub.cancel!
    assert_equal "cancelled", sub.state
  end

  test "cancel sets cancelled_at timestamp" do
    sub = subscriptions(:active)
    sub.cancel!
    assert_not_nil sub.cancelled_at
  end

  test "cancel sets cancelled_at to approximately now" do
    sub = subscriptions(:active)
    sub.cancel!
    assert_in_delta Time.current, sub.cancelled_at, 2.seconds
  end
end
